Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.tactics.tests

Class AbstractTacticTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tactics.tests.AbstractTacticTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
AutoEqvTacTests.AutoEqvGoalTac, AutoEqvTacTests.AutoEqvHypTac, AutoRmiTacTests.AutoRmiGoalTacTests, AutoRmiTacTests.AutoRmiHypTacTests, DisjGoalTacTests, DTDestrWDTacTests, FiniteInclTacTests, FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests, FunImgInGoalTacTests, FunOvrGoalTacTests, FunOvrHypTacTests, InDomGoalTacTests, MapOvrGoalAutoTacTests, MembershipGoalTacTests, NNFRewritesAutoTacTests, NotEmptyTacTests, TotalDomToCProdTacTests
public abstract class AbstractTacticTests extends Object
Common protocol for testing Event-B tactics. To take advantage of this class, just subclass it, initialize it with some tactic. The subclass will then benefit from a free test checking that the tactic is correctly registered and of several helper methods to check the correct implementation of the given tactic.

    protected void
    addToTypeEnvironment(String typenvImage)
    Completes the type environment for this test.
    protected void
    assertFailure(String sequentImage)
    Generates the sequent corresponding to the given sequent image, checks that the tactic is not applied, and verifies that the proof tree is not modified.
    protected void
    assertSuccess(String sequentImage, TreeShape expected)
    Generates the sequent corresponding to the given sequent image, checks that the tactic is successfully applied, and verifies that the output proof tree shape.

    genProofTreeNode(String sequentImage)
    Returns the root node of a proof tree built for the given sequent image

      protected void setFormulaFactory(FormulaFactory ff)

      Parameters:
      ff - formula factory of the mathematical language to use

    • addToTypeEnvironment

      protected void addToTypeEnvironment(String typenvImage)
      Completes the type environment for this test. The type environment defined by the parameter is added to this test type environment
      Parameters:
      typenvImage - string representation of some type environment
